title.en: NEON-V: Sovereign of the Cyber Streets

description.ko: 미래 공학의 걸작인 네온-V는 거대 도시의 어둡고 비에 젖은 골목을 밝힙니다. 공기역학적 프레임과 생체 발광 액센트는 첨단 하이테크 도시 이동성의 정점을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A masterpiece of futuristic engineering, the NEON-V illuminates the dark, rain-soaked alleys of the megalopolis. Its aerodynamic frame and bioluminescent accents represent the pinnacle of high-tech urban mobility.

prompt: Cinematic shot of the NEON-V, a sleek high-tech futuristic sports car with glowing violet and cyan light strips, parked on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street, towering neon skyscrapers reflecting in puddles, atmospheric fog, volumetric lighting, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, synthwave aesthetic.
